title: Quantum Mechanics Homework Problems
desc: A collection of quantum mechanics exercises covering historical foundations, wave functions, and Schrödinger equations.

title: Classical vs Quantum Physics Fundamentals
desc: Explores classical mechanics, quantum pictures, and measurement theory with mathematical foundations.
link: /physics/Quantum Physics/Quantum Optics/1. Key Concepts in Classical and Quantum Physics

title: Graviton: Massless Spin-2 Particle
desc: Explores why gravity requires a massless spin-2 particle, comparing with electromagnetism and scalar fields.

title: Massless Spin-2 Field Theory Analysis
desc: Explores massless spin-2 particles as gravity mediators, comparing with spin-0 and spin-1 fields through classical field theory.

title: General Relativity: From Lorentz to Christoffel
desc: Explores Lorentz transformations, Christoffel symbols, and the equivalence principle in general relativity.

title: Feynman Diagrams for Beginners
desc: An introductory guide to Feynman diagrams and QFT calculations, featuring exercises and a detailed electron-positron annihilation example.
link: /physics/Quantum Physics/Quantum Field Theory/Feynman Diagrams for Beginners

title: Proving Energy-Momentum Tensor Lorentz Invariance
desc: Demonstrates that the energy-momentum tensor transforms as a tensor under Lorentz transformations using delta function properties.

title: Gravitational Waves: Generation, Propagation, Detection
desc: Explains gravitational waves using linearized gravity approximations and Einstein field equations.
link: /physics/General Relativity/Gravitational Waves/Gravitational Waves Formation and Propagation

title: Analytical Mechanics Homework on Hamiltonian Dynamics
desc: Explores canonical transformations and double pendulum dynamics in Hamiltonian mechanics.

title: Analytical Mechanics Homework Solutions
desc: Proofs of canonical transformations using generating functions for various coordinate systems.
